● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.

title: Hill Climb Racing
notes:
Have you ever wanted even smaller version of hill climb racing?
 No?
 Well now you have it, may your journey be lucrative.
- Various bug fixes

title: Top Heroes: Kingdom Saga
notes: Fairy, Walker & Florist skills enhanced. Skip minions in Guild Expeditions. New "Grow Stronger" guide & Castle Skin Gift Voucher rewards added.

title: Survivor!.io
notes:

- New SP Divine Flame Survivor - Vulcan arrives at HQ.
- Twinborn Part: Phase Driver (Boomerang Mode) unlocks Resonance Overload.
